TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sasinguan, title = sasinguan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sasinguan} }

S.FORM: sasinguan (nu Hulam a kamu: 信仰) hina sakamusa tu kiwkay a sasinguan. ".
S.PHON: sasiŋuan (nu ħur~ɾam a kamu: **) ħina sakamusa tu kiwkaj a sasiŋuan. ".

S.PHON: sasiŋuan (nu ħur~ɾam a kamu: **) ħina sakamusa tu kiwkaj a sasiŋuan. ".
